constraints: The final seed of this Plot must be a patch version bump executed via the .claude/commands/release.md flow (bump package.json + src/index.ts in sync, update CHANGELOG.md, commit)
intent.goal: Eliminate a batch of warren UI papercuts \u2014 inconsistent table sorting, manual plan_id entry on plan runs, and poor mobile readiness \u2014 so tables and run-launch flows behave consistently and every page works well on phones.
non_goals: Native mobile app or PWA work — this is responsive-web polish only
Visual redesign/restyling beyond fixing the named papercuts (sorting, plan_id prefill, mobile breakage)
